text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Up and at 'em, once again! I'm off for the first run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm beginning to recognize more and more just how composed
Tannhauser remains during our training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... I know that I need to build up some more stamina, but my body can't seem to keep up...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, nothing to it but to keep trying! Can we do this again
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She acknowledges her shortcomings easily and tends not to let them
frustrate her. She even takes it a step further sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Considering your options... I think you should focus on accelerating
faster as you complete the last turn.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Nod, nod. I see, I see! Thanks muchly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She proactively seeks advice from her rivals without her pride being
hurt one bit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's often said that one requires exceptional drive, persistence,
motivation, and even luck to make it in the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Many might think that for someone as seemingly normal as
Tannhauser, this would be a treacherous path in life.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aaand I'm back! All righty, what's next for today?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Meet's tomorrow, so I wanna make sure I'm in tippy-top
shape for my rematch with Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If you can make it this far and still be "normal"... Well, that has to be
special in its own right.
choice_data_list:
Really looking forward to what you've got for
us!

Really looking forward to what you've got for
us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's with that all of a sudden? Come on... You're making me
blush!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Never letting her emotions hold her back... Pushing forward with a
smile on her face... Her potential is practically limitless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day at the Tracen Meet, Matikanetannhauser is warming up
for her 1,600-meter rematch with the lauded Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I think we can all remember the incredible lead Mihono Bourbon won
with at her last scrimmage. The excitement is palpable!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like Matikanetannhauser's running today too. She couldn't
quite make it last time, but I wonder how she'll do today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Mun. Couldn't quite make it last time, but this is this time! I'll be
taking first. Ei, ei, mun!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All of our runners have entered the gates... The 1,600-meter turf race
starts now!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is in second place. Matikanetannhauser is in fifth
place and has already passed the 600-meter mark!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The runners are entering the fourth corner. Mihono Bourbon runs in
second on the outside. Is anyone prepared for a final push?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (Okay, here's where I speed up to catch her!)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon is in the lead. Mihono Bourbon is in the lead with
200 meters to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (Wh-what the heck is up with her crazy acceleration?! No... Even so...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Really looking forward to what you've got for us!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Really looking forward to what you've got for us!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: (It doesn't matter! I'm only here to take home first!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: The leader is still Mihono Bourbon! 100 meters remain!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's hot on her tail! Can they overtake her? No, Mihono
Bourbon prevails as she crosses the finish!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: No doubt about it—Mihono Bourbon is here to stay!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
And did you see that performance by Matikanetannhauser? She might
have finished fourth, but she kept up right until the end! Might have
to keep an eye on her!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Ehehe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whew, thanks so much! I only came in fourth, but you still want to
treat me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of... Too bad about that last race. Looks like the big
leagues evade me still.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thanks a lot. Ehe, you know, I still feel like I got something out
of that race to help me grow even more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can't really explain it, but it's gotten me pretty fired up to keep on
going, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And when I think about how you're looking forward to what I've got in store, I get even more pumped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's pretty normal to turn words of encouragement into power
to succeed, but I can't help but be surprised.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to think that meeting you was one of the luckiest things to
ever happen to me, heehee.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's get right back to the grind tomorrow. But for now... halfsies!
